29.reason: [In BFS traversal, it should check adjacency of 'tmp', not 'v'. Using 'v' here causes incorrect neighbor exploration.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS traversal, it should check adjacency of 'tmp', not 'v'. Using 'v' here causes incorrect neighbor exploration.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS traversal, adjacency should be checked from 'tmp', not 'v'. Using 'v' causes incorrect neighbor exploration.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS, when exploring neighbors of 'tmp', the code incorrectly uses 'v' (the starting vertex) instead of 'tmp' (the current vertex). This causes wrong adjacency checks and incorrect traversal order.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS, when exploring neighbors of 'tmp', the code incorrectly uses 'v' (the original start vertex) instead of 'tmp'. This causes wrong adjacency checks and leads to incorrect traversal.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS traversal, should check adjacency of 'tmp', not 'v'. Using 'v' (the starting vertex) instead of 'tmp' (current vertex) causes incorrect neighbor exploration.]
